description: Updated center chassis segment with shell mount rails, dry cassette bay, low battery tray interface, and side float connector rails.
print_note: Print flat. This is a chassis test segment, not a complete waterproof hull.

description: Shell mount base/gauge for testing rail spacing, orientation key, and replaceable shell interface.
print_note: PLA is acceptable for fit test; PETG for water-adjacent tests.

description: Front half of standard turtle shell cover. First defense layer against rain, splash, mud, and shallow waterline contact.
print_note: Print with supports as needed. Keep shell light; do not over-infill.

description: Rear half of standard turtle shell cover. Provides removable roof cover and water-shedding side lips.
print_note: Print with supports as needed. Rear segment can carry Charge Scute insert in later revisions.

description: Solar/perovskite-ready pad dummy. Used to test future solar-shell mounting surface without adding panels yet.
print_note: This is a dummy pad; do not mount real panels until heat and water tests are complete.

description: Charge Scute / wireless charge window insert. Non-metallic target area for top wireless charging through the turtle shell.
print_note: Keep non-metallic. Do not place screws or metal washers near this part.

description: Top wireless charge window dummy for the charge-module slot. Used to compare cassette, wired, and wireless charging upgrades.
print_note: Dummy only. Do not connect batteries directly to wireless coil modules.

description: Inner dry cassette dummy for controller, BMS, charger electronics, and radio module. Second defense layer under shell.
print_note: Use for fit tests only; final cassette needs gasket/seal validation.

description: Low-center battery tray mockup. Keeps battery mass low while the turtle shell remains lightweight.
print_note: Do not rely on printed tray alone to restrain a real lithium battery. Add straps and mechanical locks.

material: Not for printing as one part
description: Full visual reference assembly showing revised chassis, side floats, shell, dry cassette, and charge scute concept.
print_note: Reference only. This part exceeds normal print size and is for CAD review.
